data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively validated due to a failure in the LLM evaluation call.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that the exploratory validation for the persona scenario is blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring. Without a successful evaluation, it is impossible to determine if the expected outcome of the scenario behavior being confirmed or producing a clear failure report has been met. This leads to an inconclusive status as no definitive results can be derived from the current evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
